subcodes.first_line: According to what hath been heard, it is thy purpose to prepare a guesthouse for travelers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از قرار مسموع شما را نيّت چنان که مهمانخانه‌ای به جهت مسافران مهيّا نمائيد
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @love and unity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @order; organization; tact; deliberation [tadbir]
